title: Golden Key: Golems
body:
Geckolib and Curios is required!

Golden Key: Golems adds more golems to minecraft from minecraft legends. You can create it in the golem spawner, but not all the firsts are only enable to find in the overword. If you give them stack of gold ingots, they will help you to defeat the piglins.

Golden Key: Golems is only an extension to normal Golden Key which adds more piglin from minecraft legends

Craftings:

To craft a Flames Of Creation (which is required to equip this item to spawn golems) you need 4 prismarine blocks and one piglin banner from normal Golden Key

To craft a Golem Spawner you need a Flames Of Creation (they do not wear out in crafting) 4 Prismarine Blocks and 4 lapis
